player.narrative: ShotDownBoyz looks mostly stable. KDA is 2.39, win rate is 44.4%, and current rank context is Gold 4. Progress is present but not accelerating enough yet to read as a decisive climb.
flags: Mostly wide queue: visible rank changes may be muted.

avoid.reason: Low return from repeated usage compared with other options.
